name: Rainbow Mold
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, sugar, and butter in a bowl until crumbly.
2. Place the mixture in a shallow baking pan.
3. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Press firmly onto the bottom of a 7-½ inch spring form pan.
5. Chill completely.
6. Using an ice cream dipper, scoop sherbet balls onto a cookie sheet and freeze until firm.
7. Alternate colors of sherbet balls and press firmly into the crumb-lined pan.
8. Freeze until firm.
9. To unmold, loosen the sides with a spatula. Invert onto a plate and cut into slices.
If a spring form pan is not available, firmly press the crumb mixture onto the bottom and part-way up the sides of a 2-quart mixing bowl.
